text_block_list.name: Internet Cafe Staff
text_block_list.text: I'm terribly sorry, but we're full up today!

text_block_list.name: Group of Customers
text_block_list.text:
Is that really her?! No way! That's insane!
She looks exactly like she does on Umasta!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Ah, hell! Why do they have to be renovating
today of all days?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Unable to find a quiet place to pass some time,
Air Shakur ends up in a foul mood.
